chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: application No. S-347 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of C.M.A No. 2855/ 2025. 18.07.2025 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- None for the applicant is present. Learned DPG places on record the diary sheet of the learned trial Court and stated that accused persons have been acquitted in the crime NO. 14/2024, consequently instant criminal misc: application become infructuous, same is hereby disposed of. Order accordingly JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
